examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: the only auth scheme (api_key) selected and an empty API key placeholder. secureJsonData['auth.api_key.apiKey'] must be filled in for the datasource to authenticate against PagerDuty.

apiKey.description: Authenticate against https://api.pagerduty.com with a PagerDuty REST API key. Enter the raw key; the backend sends it as 'Authorization: Token token=<key>'. A read-only key is recommended.
